query: SELECT canonicalName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids FROM product_master GROUP BY canonicalName HAVING cnt > 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT canonicalName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids FROM product_master GROUP BY canonicalName HAVING cnt > 1
